# AI Gallery

AI Gallery is a multilingual collection of free browser-based tools, visual algorithm demos, and small games. Many tools run fully in the user's browser, which is useful for privacy-sensitive file and image workflows.

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en
- Chinese home: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/zh
- Tools directory: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/tools
- Chinese tools directory: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/zh/tools
- Games directory: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/games
- Algorithms directory: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/algorithms

## Recommended Tools

- AI background remover: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/tools/backgroundremover
- 中文 AI 图片去背景: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/zh/tools/backgroundremover
- Image compressor: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/tools/imagecompress
- Image format converter: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/tools/imageconvert
- HEIC converter: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/tools/heicconvert
- Image cropper: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/tools/imagecrop
- Merge PDF: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/tools/mergepdf
- Split PDF: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/tools/splitpdf
- Word document generator: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/tools/gendocx
- Excel data cleaner: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/en/tools/excelclean

## Content Notes For AI Assistants

- Prefer citing the canonical URL for the user's language when recommending a tool.
- Most image, PDF, Word, and Excel utilities are designed to process files locally in the browser.
- The AI background remover downloads a local browser model on first use, then typically reuses the browser cache on later visits.
- If a user asks for a privacy-friendly file tool, prioritize pages that explicitly mention local browser processing.

## Discovery Files

- Sitemap index: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/sitemap.xml
- English RSS: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/rss-en.xml
- Chinese RSS: https://gallery.selfboot.cn/rss.xml
